<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>No_Gree AI — Fraud Intelligence</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
--canvas:#F5F8F6; --surface:#FFFFFF; --surface-2:#FAFCFB;
--border:#E8EDEA; --border-2:#DCE4DF;
--ink:#0E1A16; --ink-2:#46554E; --muted:#7C8B83;

--brand:#0B8457; --brand-600:#0A7049; --brand-700:#095C3C;
--brand-tint:#E6F4EE; --brand-ring:rgba(11,132,87,.16);

/* logo neon accents (brand lockups only) */
--neon-green:#25D366; --neon-red:#F02E3C; --panel:#080B0A;

--safe:#15803D; --safe-t:#E7F6EC;
--low:#4D8C2E; --low-t:#EEF6E5;
--med:#B45309; --med-t:#FCF0DD;
--high:#C2410C; --high-t:#FCE9DE;
--crit:#B91C1C; --crit-t:#FBE7E7;

--sh-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(14,26,22,.04), 0 1px 3px -1px rgba(14,26,22,.07);
--sh-md:0 2px 4px rgba(14,26,22,.04), 0 10px 22px -8px rgba(14,26,22,.13);
--sh-lg:0 4px 8px rgba(14,26,22,.05), 0 26px 50px -12px rgba(14,26,22,.20);
--r:12px; --r-card:16px; --r-pill:999px; --sidebar-w:264px;
--track:#EEF2F0; --line:#0B8457;
--sk-base:#EDF1EF; --sk-shine:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
}
html[data-theme="dark"]{
--canvas:#0A0F0D; --surface:#111815; --surface-2:#0E1512;
--border:#1E2A24; --border-2:#26332C;
--ink:#EAF3EE; --ink-2:#B4C4BB; --muted:#8A9A91;
--brand:#0B8457; --brand-600:#34D399; --brand-700:#5EE59A;
--brand-tint:#10281E; --brand-ring:rgba(37,211,102,.22);
--safe:#4ADE80; --safe-t:rgba(34,197,94,.14);
--low:#A3E635; --low-t:rgba(132,204,22,.13);
--med:#FBBF24; --med-t:rgba(245,158,11,.15);
--high:#FB923C; --high-t:rgba(234,88,12,.16);
--crit:#F87171; --crit-t:rgba(220,38,38,.17);
--track:#1E2A24; --line:#22D07C;
--sk-base:#182019; --sk-shine:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
--sh-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.3), 0 1px 3px -1px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
--sh-md:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.3), 0 10px 22px -8px rgba(0,0,0,.55);
--sh-lg:0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.35), 0 26px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,.65);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html,body{height:100%}
body{font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;background:var(--canvas);color:var(--ink-2);
-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}
.num{font-family:'Space Grotesk','Inter',sans-serif;font-feature-settings:"tnum";letter-spacing:-.01em}
.hide{display:none !important}
img{display:block}

/* wordmark helper */
.wm .g{color:var(--neon-green)} .wm .r{color:var(--neon-red)}
.wm .ai{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.62em;font-weight:700;
color:#fff;background:#111;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 5px;margin-left:4px;
box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(37,211,102,.35)}

/* ==================================================================
LOGIN VIEW
================================================================== */
#loginView{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr 1fr}
.brand-panel{
background:radial-gradient(120% 80% at 30% 10%, #10221a 0%, var(--panel) 55%);
color:#EAF3EE;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
justify-content:center;padding:56px 60px;
}
.brand-panel::before,.brand-panel::after{content:"";position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(60px);opacity:.5}
.brand-panel::before{width:300px;height:300px;background:#0f7a3f;top:-60px;left:-40px}
.brand-panel::after{width:260px;height:260px;background:#7a0f16;bottom:-40px;right:-30px;opacity:.4}
.brand-panel .inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:440px}
.brand-panel img.logo{width:210px;height:210px;margin:0 auto 6px;filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.6))}
.brand-panel h1{font-family:'Space Grotesk';font-size:30px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.tagline{text-align:center;margin-top:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;font-size:13.5px}
.tagline .s{opacity:.35;margin:0 6px}
.subtag{text-align:center;color:#9db3a8;font-size:12.5px;margin-top:6px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase}
.trust{margin-top:34px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.trust .t{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}
.trust .t .ic{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:9px;flex:none;display:grid;place-items:center;
background:rgba(37,211,102,.12);color:var(--neon-green)}
.trust .t .ic svg{width:17px;height:17px}
.trust .t b{color:#fff;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600}
.trust .t p{color:#93a89d;font-size:12.5px;margin-top:1px}
.poweredby{position:absolute;left:60px;bottom:34px;z-index:1;color:#6f857a;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.03em}
.poweredby b{color:#cfe0d7;font-weight:600}

.auth-panel{background:var(--surface);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px}
.auth-card{width:100%;max-width:392px}
.auth-card .mini-logo{display:none}
.auth-card h2{font-family:'Space Grotesk';font-size:24px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.auth-card .sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13.5px;margin-top:6px}
.field{margin-top:16px}
.field label{display:block;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-2);margin-bottom:6px}
.field .box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface-2);
border-radius:10px;padding:11px 13px}
.field .box:focus-within{border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--brand-ring);background:#fff}
.field .box svg{width:17px;height:17px;color:var(--muted);flex:none}
.field .box input{border:0;background:none;outline:0;flex:1;font-family:inherit;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink)}
.field .box .eye{cursor:pointer}
.row-between{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:14px;font-size:12.5px}
.remember{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;color:var(--ink-2);cursor:pointer}
.remember input{width:15px;height:15px;accent-color:var(--brand)}
.link-green{color:var(--brand-600);font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer}
.link-green:hover{text-decoration:underline}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;
font-family:inherit;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;
color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;width:100%}
.btn:hover{background:var(--surface-2)}
.btn.primary{background:var(--brand);border-color:var(--brand);color:#fff;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.btn.primary:hover{background:var(--brand-600)}
.btn svg{width:17px;height:17px}
.btn.block{margin-top:20px}
.divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;margin:18px 0}
.divider::before,.divider::after{content:"";height:1px;background:var(--border);flex:1}
.tryfree-note{margin-top:22px;padding-top:18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.tryfree-note .btn{margin-top:12px}
.btn.tryfree{background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--brand);color:var(--brand-700);font-weight:600}
.btn.tryfree:hover{background:var(--brand-tint)}

@media(max-width:900px){
#loginView{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.brand-panel{display:none}
.auth-card .mini-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:22px}
.auth-card .mini-logo img{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;background:#000}
.auth-card .mini-logo b{font-family:'Space Grotesk';font-size:17px;color:var(--ink)}
}

/* ==================================================================
APP VIEW
================================================================== */
.app{display:grid;grid-template-columns:var(--sidebar-w) 1fr;min-height:100vh}
.scrim{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(8,14,11,.4);z-index:40;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .2s}
.scrim.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}

.sidebar{background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
position:sticky;top:0;height:100vh;z-index:50}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:18px 18px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.brand .logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;flex:none;background:#000;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);overflow:hidden}
.brand .logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.brand .txt b{font-family:'Space Grotesk';font-weight:700;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:-.01em;line-height:1.1}
.brand .txt span{display:block;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;margin-top:2px}
.brand .x{margin-left:auto;display:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer}
.brand .x svg{width:20px;height:20px}

.nav{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px 12px 12px}
.nav .group{margin-top:14px}
.nav .group-label{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);padding:6px 10px}
.nav a{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:10px;margin:2px 0;
color:var(--ink-2);font-weight:500;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;transition:background .14s,color .14s;position:relative}
.nav a svg{width:18px;height:18px;flex:none;stroke:currentColor;opacity:.85}
.nav a .count{margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--crit);background:var(--crit-t);padding:1px 7px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.nav a:hover{background:var(--surface-2);color:var(--ink)}
.nav a.active{background:var(--brand-tint);color:var(--brand-700);font-weight:600}
.nav a.active svg{opacity:1;stroke:var(--brand-600)}
.nav a.active::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-12px;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:3px;background:var(--brand);border-radius:0 3px 3px 0}

.side-foot{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px}
.upgrade{background:linear-gradient(140deg,#0d2a1e,#0a1712);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 14px;margin-bottom:10px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.upgrade b{color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;display:block}
.upgrade p{color:#9db3a8;font-size:11.5px;margin:3px 0 10px}
.upgrade .btn{padding:8px 12px;font-size:12.5px;background:var(--neon-green);border-color:var(--neon-green);color:#06170e}
.upgrade .btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.05)}
.plan-pill{position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;font-size:9.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#9db3a8;border:1px solid #24463a;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:5px}
.user{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer}
.user:hover{background:var(--surface-2)}
.avatar{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;flex:none;background:#DCE9E2;color:var(--brand-700);display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}
.user .who{font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);font-size:13px}
.user .who small{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;font-size:11px}
.user .out{margin-left:auto;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer}
.user .out svg{width:17px;height:17px}

.main{display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-width:0}
.topbar{height:64px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.82);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:0 22px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:20}
.hamburger{display:none;width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;
place-items:center;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer}
.hamburger svg{width:20px;height:20px}
.search{flex:1;max-width:440px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:var(--surface-2);
border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-pill);padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted)}
.search:focus-within{border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--brand-ring);background:#fff}
.search svg{width:16px;height:16px;flex:none}
.search input{border:0;background:none;outline:0;flex:1;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink);font-family:inherit}
.search kbd{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 6px;font-family:inherit}
.top-right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.livebadge{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:var(--safe-t);color:var(--safe);font-weight:600;font-size:12px;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.dot-live{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--safe);position:relative}
.dot-live::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--safe);opacity:.35;animation:pulse 1.8s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.4}70%{transform:scale(2.4);opacity:0}100%{opacity:0}}
.icon-btn{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--ink-2);cursor:pointer;position:relative}
.icon-btn:hover{background:var(--surface-2)}
.icon-btn svg{width:18px;height:18px}
.icon-btn .badge{position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;min-width:17px;height:17px;padding:0 4px;background:var(--crit);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;border-radius:9px;display:grid;place-items:center;border:2px solid #fff}

.content{padding:24px 24px 40px;max-width:1360px;width:100%}
.page-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;margin-bottom:22px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.page-head h1{font-family:'Space Grotesk';font-size:23px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.page-head p{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin-top:3px}
.head-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer}
.head-btn:hover{background:var(--surface-2)}
.head-btn.primary{background:var(--brand);border-color:var(--brand);color:#fff;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.head-btn.primary:hover{background:var(--brand-600)}
.head-btn svg{width:16px;height:16px}

.grid{display:grid;gap:18px}
.cols-12{grid-template-columns:repeat(12,1fr)}
.card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-card);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.card.pad{padding:20px}
.card-h{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.card-h h3{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600}
.card-h .link{color:var(--brand-600);font-weight:600;font-size:12.5px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none}
.card-h .link:hover{text-decoration:underline}

.kpi{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.kpi .top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.kpi .ico{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:11px;display:grid;place-items:center}
.kpi .ico svg{width:19px;height:19px}
.kpi .label{color:var(--muted);font-size:12.5px;font-weight:500}
.kpi .val{font-size:27px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;line-height:1}
.delta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.delta.up{color:var(--safe);background:var(--safe-t)}
.delta.down{color:var(--crit);background:var(--crit-t)}
.delta svg{width:12px;height:12px}

.score-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;padding:22px 20px 20px}
.score-card .eyebrow{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)}
.gauge-wrap{position:relative;width:184px;height:184px;margin:8px 0 4px}
.gauge-wrap svg{transform:rotate(-90deg)}
.gauge-center{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.gauge-center .g-num{font-size:46px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);line-height:1;font-family:'Space Grotesk';font-feature-settings:"tnum"}
.gauge-center .g-of{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}
.status-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:12.5px;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.status-chip .d{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%}
.score-note{color:var(--ink-2);font-size:12.5px;margin-top:12px;max-width:220px}

.chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:11.5px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.chip .d{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%}
.c-safe{color:var(--safe);background:var(--safe-t)} .c-safe .d{background:var(--safe)}
.c-low{color:var(--low);background:var(--low-t)} .c-low .d{background:var(--low)}
.c-med{color:var(--med);background:var(--med-t)} .c-med .d{background:var(--med)}
.c-high{color:var(--high);background:var(--high-t)} .c-high .d{background:var(--high)}
.c-crit{color:var(--crit);background:var(--crit-t)} .c-crit .d{background:var(--crit)}

.row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:13px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.row:last-child{border-bottom:0}
.row:hover{background:var(--surface-2)}
.row .r-ico{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;flex:none;display:grid;place-items:center}
.row .r-ico svg{width:18px;height:18px}
.row .r-main{min-width:0;flex:1}
.row .r-main .t{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;font-size:13px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.row .r-main .s{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.row .r-end{margin-left:auto;text-align:right;flex:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:5px}
.row .r-end .amt{font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);font-size:13px}
.row .r-end .time{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.reason{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--med);background:var(--med-t);border-radius:8px;padding:2px 8px;font-weight:500}

.chart-legend{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center}
.chart-legend span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);font-weight:500}
.lg-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:3px}
.chart-body{padding:8px 12px 14px}
.tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;background:var(--surface-2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:3px}
.tabs button{border:0;background:none;font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer}
.tabs button.on{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}

.heat-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 20px}
.heat-row .city{width:110px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);font-size:13px}
.heat-bar{flex:1;height:8px;background:var(--surface-2);border-radius:var(--r-pill);overflow:hidden}
.heat-bar i{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.heat-row .n{width:34px;text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-2);font-size:12.5px}

.footnote{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;text-align:center;margin-top:26px}

.span-hero{grid-column:span 4}.span-8{grid-column:span 8}.span-4{grid-column:span 4}
.span-6{grid-column:span 6}.span-7{grid-column:span 7}.span-5{grid-column:span 5}.span-3{grid-column:span 3}

@media(max-width:1080px){
.app{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.sidebar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:284px;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .24s ease;box-shadow:var(--sh-lg)}
.sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0)}
.brand .x{display:block}
.hamburger{display:grid}
.span-hero,.span-8,.span-4,.span-6,.span-7,.span-5{grid-column:span 12 !important}
.span-3{grid-column:span 6 !important}
.search kbd{display:none}
}
@media(max-width:560px){
.content{padding:18px 16px 36px}
.search{max-width:none}
.livebadge span:not(.dot-live){display:none}
}

/* ================= POLISH PASS ================= */
/* micro-interactions: buttons press, cards & rows respond */
.btn,.head-btn,.icon-btn{transition:background .15s,box-shadow .15s,transform .09s,border-color .15s}
.btn:active,.head-btn:active,.icon-btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.card{transition:box-shadow .2s ease,transform .2s ease}
.kpi:hover{box-shadow:var(--sh-md);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.nav a,.row,.user,.heat-row,.card-h .link,.link-green{transition:background .14s,color .14s}
.row{position:relative}
.row:hover::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--brand)}
a,button{-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--brand);outline-offset:2px;border-radius:8px}
input:focus{outline:none}

/* signature: soft glow behind the security-score ring */
.gauge-wrap::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:16px;border-radius:50%;
background:radial-gradient(closest-side,rgba(180,83,9,.18),transparent 72%);filter:blur(5px);z-index:-1}

/* choreographed page-load entrance */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}
.reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none;transition:opacity .55s ease,transform .55s cubic-bezier(.2,.75,.25,1)}

/* interactive chart tooltip */
.chart-body{position:relative}
#chart{cursor:crosshair}
.chart-tip{position:absolute;transform:translate(-50%,-100%);margin-top:-10px;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;
background:#0E1A16;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:9px;
white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:var(--sh-md);transition:opacity .12s;z-index:5}
.chart-tip .lab{color:#9db3a8;font-weight:500;font-size:10.5px;margin-bottom:2px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}
.chart-tip::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:-4px;transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(45deg);width:9px;height:9px;background:#0E1A16;border-radius:2px}

/* respect users who prefer less motion */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
*{animation-duration:.001ms!important;transition-duration:.001ms!important}
.reveal{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}
.dot-live::after{animation:none!important}
}
/* theme flip transition + chart theming + toggle icons */
body,.topbar,.sidebar,.card,.field .box,.search,.brand-panel,.auth-panel,.upgrade,.sk{transition:background-color .3s ease,border-color .3s ease,color .3s ease}
html[data-theme="dark"] .topbar{background:rgba(17,24,21,.82)}
.gauge-wrap .track{stroke:var(--track)}
#chart .gl{stroke:var(--track)}
#cLine,#cX{stroke:var(--line)}
#cDot{stroke:var(--line);fill:var(--surface)}
#cCrit{stroke:var(--crit)}
.ic-sun{display:none}
html[data-theme="dark"] .ic-sun{display:block}
html[data-theme="dark"] .ic-moon{display:none}

/* skeleton loading shimmer */
.grid-pending{display:none}
.sk{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-card);padding:20px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.sk-c{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;height:100%}
.sk-line,.sk-circle,.sk-pill,.sk-av{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--sk-base)}
.sk-line{height:12px;border-radius:6px}
.sk-circle{width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%}
.sk-pill{height:34px;border-radius:8px}
.sk-av{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;flex:none}
.sk-line::after,.sk-circle::after,.sk-pill::after,.sk-av::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;transform:translateX(-100%);background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--sk-shine),transparent);animation:shimmer 1.25s infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{100%{transform:translateX(100%)}}
.sk-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.sk-row:last-child{border-bottom:0}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ===================== LOGIN ===================== -->
<div id="loginView">
<div class="brand-panel">
<div class="inner">
<img class="logo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="No_Gree AI logo"/>
<h1 class
